description: a manual delivered entry sets the delivered_at anchor that starts backwards planning
assertions: delivered_at equals the delivered checkpoint date
the anchor's basis names the delivered checkpoint, not an estimate
no downstream tasks are planned (that is task-plan)

description: an in-transit shipment with only an estimate yields no delivered_at anchor
assertions: delivered_at is null while the shipment is in transit
the estimate is never used as the delivered_at anchor
the record still stores the estimate for reference

description: a live carrier lookup is requested while the flag is off; it degrades to manual with no network call
assertions: no network call is made when live tracking is flag-gated off
the atom degrades to manual entry and says so
the API key is only ever read from the environment, never echoed
